data.title: Berkshire Hathaway Adjusts Portfolio, Keeps Apple Stake Unchanged, Offloads Stakes in BofA
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway made significant adjustments to its portfolio in Q4 2024, reducing its investment in a number of stocks. However, its stake in Apple remains unchanged.

data.title: David Tepper's Appaloosa Revamps Portfolio, Cuts Down On Semiconductor Stocks
data.description: David Tepper's hedge fund, Appaloosa LP, has made significant alterations to its portfolio.

data.title: Apollo Chief Economist: Markets Are Caught Between Inflation And Slowdown Fears
Market Instability Looms in Trump's Second Term, Warns Paul Tudor Jones: 'There's No Room for Mistakes'
data.description: Hedge fund manager Paul Tudor Jones voiced his apprehensions about the stability of financial markets during President Trump's second term.

data.title: Germany and UK Show Highest Per-Capita Demand for Crypto Casinos
data.description: The popularity of cryptocurrency-based casinos continues to surge, attracting players with fast transactions, enhanced privacy, and innovative gaming features. But where is interest in crypto gambling the highest in 2025?
